proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher age_years is associated with longer pfs_months (positive correlation).
Higher ecog_ps is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative association).
Patients with stage_iv = 1 have shorter pfs_months than patients with stage_iv = 0.
Patients with has_brain_mets = 1 have shorter pfs_months than patients with has_brain_mets = 0.
Patients with er_positive = 1 have longer pfs_months than patients with er_positive = 0.
Patients with pik3ca_mutation = 1 have shorter pfs_months than patients without the mutation.
Patients with her2_positive = 1 have shorter pfs_months than patients without HER2 amplification.

analyses.result_summary: Pearson correlation of age_years with pfs_months r=+0.7015 (p=0.00e+00).
Mean pfs_months by ecog_ps = 0: 5.640, 1: 4.444, 2: 3.289. Pearson r=-0.3204 (p=0.00e+00).
Mean pfs_months in stage_iv=1 (3.617) vs stage_iv=0 (5.153); diff -1.536 months (Welch t-test p=0.00e+00).
Mean pfs_months in has_brain_mets=1 (3.750) vs 0 (4.800); diff -1.050 months (p=1.45e-178).
Mean pfs_months in er_positive=1 (4.865) vs 0 (4.297); diff +0.568 months (p=3.70e-143).
Mean pfs_months in pik3ca_mutation=1 (4.328) vs 0 (4.887); diff -0.559 months (p=6.07e-144).
Mean pfs_months in her2_positive=1 (4.317) vs 0 (4.776); diff -0.459 months (p=6.10e-70).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher weight_loss_pct_6mo is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative correlation).
Higher albumin_g_dl is associated with longer pfs_months (positive correlation).
Higher ki67_pct is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative correlation).
Patients with pr_positive = 1 have longer pfs_months than patients with pr_positive = 0.
Patients with her2_low = 1 have longer pfs_months than patients with her2_low = 0.
Patients with brca1_mutation = 1 have shorter pfs_months than patients without the mutation.
Higher ldh_u_l is associated with shorter pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: Pearson r between weight_loss_pct_6mo and pfs_months = -0.1155 (p=4.07e-148).
Pearson r between albumin_g_dl and pfs_months = +0.1002 (p=9.39e-112).
Pearson r between ki67_pct and pfs_months = -0.0914 (p=2.98e-93).
Mean pfs_months in pr_positive=1 (4.824) vs 0 (4.462); diff +0.362 months (p=5.82e-59).
Mean pfs_months in her2_low=1 (4.765) vs 0 (4.650); diff +0.114 months (p=1.04e-06).
Mean pfs_months in brca1_mutation=1 (4.669) vs 0 (4.694); diff -0.024 months (p=7.24e-01).
Pearson r between ldh_u_l and pfs_months = -0.0164 (p=2.45e-04).

proposed_hypotheses.text: After multivariable adjustment for all features, age_years remains positively associated with pfs_months.
After multivariable adjustment, ecog_ps remains negatively associated with pfs_months.
After multivariable adjustment, stage_iv remains negatively associated with pfs_months.
After multivariable adjustment, treatment_palbociclib has a positive main-effect coefficient on pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: Multivariable OLS coefficient for age_years = +0.1757 months per year (p=0.00e+00). Model R^2=0.792.
Multivariable OLS coefficient for ecog_ps = -1.1715 months per unit ECOG (p=0.00e+00).
Multivariable OLS coefficient for stage_iv = -1.5488 months (p=0.00e+00).
Multivariable OLS coefficient for treatment_palbociclib = +1.1011 months (p=0.00e+00).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients receiving treatment_palbociclib have longer pfs_months than those not receiving it (marginal).
Patients receiving treatment_pembrolizumab have shorter pfs_months than those not receiving it (marginal).
Patients receiving treatment_trastuzumab have different pfs_months than those not receiving it (marginal).
Patients receiving treatment_olaparib have different pfs_months than those not receiving it (marginal).
Patients receiving treatment_tamoxifen have different pfs_months than those not receiving it (marginal).
Patients receiving treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan have different pfs_months than those not receiving it (marginal).

analyses.result_summary: Mean pfs_months in treatment_palbociclib=1 (5.408) vs treatment_palbociclib=0 (4.310); diff +1.098 months (Welch t-test p=0.00e+00).
Mean pfs_months in treatment_pembrolizumab=1 (4.630) vs treatment_pembrolizumab=0 (4.704); diff -0.074 months (Welch t-test p=1.75e-02).
Mean pfs_months in treatment_trastuzumab=1 (4.645) vs treatment_trastuzumab=0 (4.705); diff -0.060 months (Welch t-test p=2.92e-02).
Mean pfs_months in treatment_olaparib=1 (4.660) vs treatment_olaparib=0 (4.696); diff -0.036 months (Welch t-test p=3.30e-01).
Mean pfs_months in treatment_tamoxifen=1 (4.723) vs treatment_tamoxifen=0 (4.680); diff +0.043 months (Welch t-test p=7.69e-02).
Mean pfs_months in treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan=1 (4.686) vs treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan=0 (4.694); diff -0.007 months (Welch t-test p=8.46e-01).

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjusting for age_years, ecog_ps, stage_iv, has_brain_mets, albumin_g_dl, ldh_u_l, crp_mg_l, nlr, treatment_palbociclib retains a positive main-effect on pfs_months.
After covariate adjustment, treatment_pembrolizumab has a negative or null marginal effect on pfs_months across the whole cohort.
After covariate adjustment, treatment_trastuzumab has a null marginal effect on pfs_months across the whole cohort.
After covariate adjustment, treatment_olaparib has a null marginal effect on pfs_months across the whole cohort.
After covariate adjustment, treatment_tamoxifen has a null marginal effect on pfs_months across the whole cohort.
After covariate adjustment, treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan has a null marginal effect on pfs_months across the whole cohort.

analyses.result_summary: OLS coefficient for treatment_palbociclib adjusted for age_years, ecog_ps, stage_iv, has_brain_mets, albumin_g_dl, ldh_u_l, crp_mg_l, nlr = +1.0972 months (p=0.00e+00, model R^2=0.742).
OLS coefficient for treatment_pembrolizumab adjusted for age_years, ecog_ps, stage_iv, has_brain_mets, albumin_g_dl, ldh_u_l, crp_mg_l, nlr = -0.0369 months (p=3.10e-02, model R^2=0.698).
OLS coefficient for treatment_trastuzumab adjusted for age_years, ecog_ps, stage_iv, has_brain_mets, albumin_g_dl, ldh_u_l, crp_mg_l, nlr = -0.0166 months (p=2.79e-01, model R^2=0.698).
OLS coefficient for treatment_olaparib adjusted for age_years, ecog_ps, stage_iv, has_brain_mets, albumin_g_dl, ldh_u_l, crp_mg_l, nlr = -0.0293 months (p=1.55e-01, model R^2=0.698).
OLS coefficient for treatment_tamoxifen adjusted for age_years, ecog_ps, stage_iv, has_brain_mets, albumin_g_dl, ldh_u_l, crp_mg_l, nlr = +0.0044 months (p=7.44e-01, model R^2=0.698).
OLS coefficient for treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan adjusted for age_years, ecog_ps, stage_iv, has_brain_mets, albumin_g_dl, ldh_u_l, crp_mg_l, nlr = +0.0203 months (p=3.22e-01, model R^2=0.698).

proposed_hypotheses.text: treatment_trastuzumab improves pfs_months specifically in her2_positive=1 patients (positive interaction term: trastuzumab x her2_positive > 0).
treatment_trastuzumab improves pfs_months in her2_low=1 (HER2-low) patients beyond the her2_positive=0 group baseline (positive interaction trastuzumab x her2_low > 0).

analyses.result_summary: OLS interaction trastuzumab*her2_positive beta=-0.0280 (p=6.95e-01). Within her2_positive=1: trastuzumab effect -0.079 (p=1.53e-01). Within her2_positive=0: -0.051 (p=1.06e-01). Hypothesis refuted.
OLS interaction trastuzumab*her2_low beta=+0.0678 (p=2.41e-01). Not significant.

proposed_hypotheses.text: treatment_tamoxifen improves pfs_months specifically in er_positive=1 patients (positive interaction term: tamoxifen x er_positive > 0).
Within er_positive=1, treatment_tamoxifen has a positive effect on pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: OLS interaction tamoxifen*er_positive beta=-0.0582 (p=2.70e-01). Within er_positive=1: tamoxifen effect +0.023 (p=4.49e-01). Within er_positive=0: +0.081 (p=3.00e-02). Refuted (negative direction interaction, both subgroup effects near null).
Within er_positive=1, tamoxifen yields PFS diff +0.023 months (p=4.49e-01); not significant.

proposed_hypotheses.text: treatment_palbociclib has a strongly positive effect on pfs_months specifically in er_positive=1 patients (palbociclib x er_positive interaction > 0).
Within er_positive=1 patients, treatment_palbociclib increases pfs_months by ~1.5 months.
Within er_positive=0 patients, treatment_palbociclib has a null effect on pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: OLS interaction palbociclib*er_positive beta=+1.5944 months (p=9.31e-229). Strongly supported.
Within er_positive=1, palbociclib effect on pfs_months = +1.577 months (p=0.00e+00).
Within er_positive=0, palbociclib effect on pfs_months = -0.017 months (p=6.28e-01); confirms null.

proposed_hypotheses.text: treatment_palbociclib effect on pfs_months differs by postmenopausal status (palbociclib x postmenopausal interaction != 0).
The palbociclib benefit in er_positive=1 patients is concentrated in those who are postmenopausal=1; effect is null in er_positive=1 + postmenopausal=0 patients.

analyses.result_summary: OLS interaction palbociclib*postmenopausal beta=-0.1337 months (p=4.29e-03). Within postmenopausal=1: +1.045; within postmenopausal=0: +1.179.

Within er_positive=1 + postmenopausal=1: palbociclib diff +1.502 (p=0.00e+00). Within er_positive=1 + postmenopausal=0: +1.690 (p=4.01e-293). REFUTED: benefit is at least as large (slightly larger) in premenopausal ER+ patients.

proposed_hypotheses.text: treatment_olaparib improves pfs_months specifically in BRCA1- or BRCA2-mutated patients (olaparib x brca_any interaction > 0).
Within brca1_mutation=1 patients, treatment_olaparib increases pfs_months.
Within brca2_mutation=1 patients, treatment_olaparib increases pfs_months.
Within patients with neither brca1_mutation nor brca2_mutation, treatment_olaparib has a null effect on pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: OLS interaction olaparib*brca_any beta=+0.4022 (p=2.08e-02). Within brca_any=1: olaparib effect +0.346 (p=4.05e-02). Within brca_any=0: -0.056 (p=1.45e-01).
Within brca1_mutation=1 (n_treated=120, n_untreated=1157), olaparib diff +0.398 months (p=8.96e-02); positive direction.
Within brca2_mutation=1, olaparib diff +0.295 months (p=2.25e-01); positive direction.
Within brca1=0 AND brca2=0, olaparib diff -0.056 months (p=1.45e-01); null.

proposed_hypotheses.text: treatment_pembrolizumab effect on pfs_months differs between triple_negative=1 (er_positive=0 AND pr_positive=0 AND her2_positive=0) and non-triple-negative patients (positive interaction).
Within triple_negative=1 patients, treatment_pembrolizumab is associated with longer pfs_months.
Within non-triple-negative patients, treatment_pembrolizumab is associated with shorter pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: OLS interaction pembrolizumab*triple_negative beta=+0.1853 (p=1.52e-02); supported.
Within triple_negative=1 (n_treated=1578), pembrolizumab diff +0.072 months (p=2.14e-01); positive direction but not significant alone.
Within triple_negative=0, pembrolizumab diff -0.114 months (p=1.64e-03); modest negative effect.

proposed_hypotheses.text: treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan effect on pfs_months is greater in triple_negative=1 patients than in non-triple-negative patients (positive interaction).
Within triple_negative=1 patients, treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan is associated with longer pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: OLS interaction sacituzumab_govitecan*triple_negative beta=-0.1046 (p=2.46e-01); not significant.
Within triple_negative=1 (n_treated=1084), sacituzumab_govitecan diff -0.085 months (p=2.08e-01); not significant and negative direction.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Within her2_positive=1 patients, treatment_trastuzumab is associated with longer pfs_months than no trastuzumab.
Within her2_positive=0 AND her2_low=1 patients (HER2-low), treatment_trastuzumab is associated with longer pfs_months.
Within her2_positive=0 AND her2_low=0 patients (HER2-zero), treatment_trastuzumab is associated with longer pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: Within her2_positive=1 (n_treated=1890), trastuzumab diff -0.079 months (p=1.53e-01); refuted - direction negative.
Within HER2-low (her2_positive=0 AND her2_low=1), trastuzumab diff -0.016 months (p=7.33e-01); null/refuted.
Within HER2-zero, trastuzumab diff -0.080 months (p=5.94e-02); refuted (negative direction).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Across an exhaustive screen of treatment x binary-feature interactions on pfs_months, the largest signal is treatment_palbociclib x er_positive (positive direction).
After palbociclib x er_positive, the next strongest treatment-effect heterogeneity signals on pfs_months are treatment_palbociclib with HR-related markers and treatment_olaparib with brca_any.

analyses.result_summary: Top 6 treatment x binary modifier interactions (sorted by p): treatment_palbociclib x pik3ca_mutation: beta=-1.6230, p=4.00e-255; treatment_palbociclib x er_positive: beta=+1.5944, p=9.31e-229; treatment_palbociclib x triple_negative: beta=-1.3910, p=3.34e-136; treatment_palbociclib x her2_positive: beta=-1.3637, p=2.19e-118; treatment_palbociclib x pr_positive: beta=+1.0928, p=2.60e-117; treatment_palbociclib x her2_low: beta=+0.4192, p=9.33e-19.

Next interactions after palbociclib*er_positive include treatment_palbociclib x er_positive (beta=+1.5944, p=9.31e-229); treatment_palbociclib x triple_negative (beta=-1.3910, p=3.34e-136); treatment_palbociclib x her2_positive (beta=-1.3637, p=2.19e-118); treatment_palbociclib x pr_positive (beta=+1.0928, p=2.60e-117); treatment_palbociclib x her2_low (beta=+0.4192, p=9.33e-19)

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with albumin_g_dl below the cohort median (albumin_low=1) have shorter pfs_months than those above the median.
Patients with ldh_u_l above the cohort median (ldh_high=1) have shorter pfs_months than those at/below.
treatment_pembrolizumab x ldh_high interaction is non-zero on pfs_months (treatment-effect heterogeneity by LDH).

analyses.result_summary: Mean pfs_months in albumin_low=1 (4.474) vs albumin_low=0 (4.877); diff -0.404 months (p=8.50e-73).
Mean pfs_months in ldh_high=1 (4.673) vs ldh_high=0 (4.713); diff -0.040 months (p=7.68e-02); not significant.
Pembrolizumab x ldh_high interaction beta=+0.0907 (p=1.45e-01); not significant.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Within er_positive=1 + postmenopausal=1, treatment_palbociclib retains a strong positive effect on pfs_months after adjusting for age, ECOG, stage IV, albumin, LDH, CRP.
Within brca_any=1 (BRCA1 or BRCA2 mutated), treatment_olaparib retains a positive effect on pfs_months after multivariable adjustment.
Within triple_negative=1, treatment_pembrolizumab retains a positive effect on pfs_months after multivariable adjustment.
Within her2_positive=1, treatment_trastuzumab does NOT show a positive effect on pfs_months after multivariable adjustment.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted palbociclib coef in er_positive=1 + postmenopausal=1: +1.5531 (p=0.00e+00); strongly positive.
Adjusted olaparib coef in brca_any=1: +0.0899 (p=3.17e-01); positive direction but no longer significant after adjustment.
Adjusted pembrolizumab coef in triple_negative=1: +0.0135 (p=2.79e-01); near-null after adjustment.
Adjusted trastuzumab coef in her2_positive=1: +0.0125 (p=1.84e-01); null/refuted.

proposed_hypotheses.text: treatment_palbociclib effect on pfs_months is similar in stage_iv=1 and stage_iv=0 patients.
treatment_pembrolizumab effect on pfs_months differs between stage_iv=1 and stage_iv=0.

analyses.result_summary: Palbociclib in stage_iv=1: diff +1.102 (p=8.16e-171); in stage_iv=0: diff +1.096 (p=0.00e+00); both positive and similar.
Pembrolizumab in stage_iv=1: diff -0.031 (p=5.63e-01); in stage_iv=0: -0.090 (p=1.30e-02); modest difference.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The treatment_palbociclib benefit is present in BOTH er_positive=1 + postmenopausal=1 AND er_positive=1 + postmenopausal=0 patients (concentrated in er_positive=1 regardless of menopausal status).
Within er_positive=0, treatment_palbociclib has no effect on pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: Within er_positive=1 + postmenopausal=1: palbociclib diff = +1.502 months (p=0.00e+00). Within er_positive=1 + postmenopausal=0: palbociclib diff = +1.690 months (p=4.01e-293). Both subgroups show large positive effect.
Within er_positive=0: palbociclib diff = -0.017 months (p=6.28e-01); confirms null.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The pembrolizumab x triple_negative interaction on pfs_months is concentrated in postmenopausal=0 patients (3-way interaction pembrolizumab*triple_negative*postmenopausal is negative).

After multivariable adjustment, the pembrolizumab effect within triple_negative=1 + postmenopausal=0 collapses toward null, suggesting the unadjusted interaction is driven by confounding by other prognostic features.

analyses.result_summary: OLS pfs_months ~ treatment_pembrolizumab * triple_negative * postmenopausal. pembrolizumab:triple_negative beta=+0.422 (p=5.78e-04); pembrolizumab:triple_negative:postmenopausal beta=-0.389 (p=1.31e-02). Within triple_negative=1 + postmenopausal=0: pembrolizumab diff = +0.275 (p=2.69e-03, n_treated=611, n_untreated=3552). Within triple_negative=1 + postmenopausal=1: -0.059 (p=4.24e-01).

Adjusted OLS within triple_negative=1 + postmenopausal=0 (covariates: age_years, ecog_ps, stage_iv, has_brain_mets, albumin_g_dl, ldh_u_l, crp_mg_l, nlr): pembrolizumab beta = +0.022 (p=0.142). The unadjusted +0.275 effect collapses after adjustment - the apparent benefit is largely confounded.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Within her2_positive=1 + ecog_ps=0, treatment_trastuzumab is associated with longer pfs_months.
Within her2_positive=1 + stage_iv=1, treatment_trastuzumab is associated with longer pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: Within her2_positive=1 + ecog_ps=0 (n_treated=674), trastuzumab diff = -0.186 (p=3.10e-02); direction is negative (refutes hypothesis).
Within her2_positive=1 + stage_iv=1 (n_treated=587), trastuzumab diff = -0.108 (p=2.40e-01); not significant, direction negative.

proposed_hypotheses.text: treatment_palbociclib effect on pfs_months interacts with ecog_ps (smaller benefit at higher ECOG).
treatment_pembrolizumab effect on pfs_months interacts with ecog_ps.

analyses.result_summary: OLS palbociclib*ecog_ps interaction beta=+0.0091 (p=7.75e-01). Diff in ecog_ps=0: +1.115; in ecog_ps>=1: +1.101.
OLS pembrolizumab*ecog_ps interaction beta=-0.0836 (p=5.17e-02); not significant.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Within brca_any=1 + postmenopausal=0, treatment_olaparib increases pfs_months more than within brca_any=1 + postmenopausal=1.
Within brca_any=1 + stage_iv=1, treatment_olaparib increases pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: Within brca_any=1 + postmenopausal=0 (n_treated=90, n_untreated=878): olaparib diff = +0.547 months (p=5.09e-02). Within brca_any=1 + postmenopausal=1 (n_treated=149, n_untreated=1382): olaparib diff = +0.226 months (p=2.86e-01). Effect appears larger in premenopausal BRCA carriers, suggestive but underpowered.
Within brca_any=1 + stage_iv=1 (n_treated=66): olaparib diff = +0.538 months (p=6.59e-02). Within brca_any=1 + stage_iv=0 (n_treated=173): +0.204 months (p=2.94e-01). Suggestive but underpowered.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Treatment_palbociclib best-supported predictive subgroup is er_positive=1 (PFS gain ~+1.58 months).
Treatment_olaparib best-supported predictive subgroup is brca1_mutation=1 OR brca2_mutation=1 (PFS gain ~+0.35 months unadjusted).
Treatment_pembrolizumab best-supported predictive subgroup is triple_negative=1 (er_positive=0 AND pr_positive=0 AND her2_positive=0); positive direction within TNBC, slight harm outside.
Treatment_trastuzumab has NO predictive subgroup with a clear PFS benefit in this cohort.
Treatment_tamoxifen has NO predictive subgroup with a clear PFS benefit in this cohort.
Treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan has NO predictive subgroup with a clear PFS benefit in this cohort.

analyses.result_summary: Within er_positive=1 (n_treated=12194, n_untreated=22692), palbociclib diff = +1.577 months (p<1e-300). Within er_positive=0 (n_treated=5234, n_untreated=14825), diff = -0.017 (p=0.628). Adjusted (age, ECOG, stage, brain_mets, albumin, LDH, CRP, NLR, postmenopausal): beta=+1.573 (p<1e-300).
Within brca_any=1 (n_treated=239, n_untreated=2260), olaparib diff = +0.346 months (p=4.05e-02). Adjusted beta=+0.090 (p=3.17e-01); attenuated after adjustment.
Within triple_negative=1 (n_treated=1578), pembrolizumab diff = +0.072 (p=2.14e-01); positive direction. Outside TNBC: -0.114 (p=1.6e-3). Interaction term significant (p=1.5e-2).
In her2_positive=1, trastuzumab diff = -0.079 (p=1.53e-01); adjusted beta=+0.012 (p=1.84e-01). No subgroup yields a positive significant effect.
In er_positive=1, tamoxifen diff = +0.023 (p=4.49e-01); adjusted beta=-0.0001 (p=9.95e-01). No clear benefit subgroup.
In triple_negative=1, sacituzumab diff = -0.085 (p=2.08e-01); not significant and direction negative.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The complete predictive subgroup for treatment_palbociclib's positive effect on pfs_months is er_positive=1, with no other unfavorable feature acting as a suppressor; the effect is +1.502 months in postmenopausal=1 ER+ and +1.690 months in postmenopausal=0 ER+, similar magnitudes.

The complete predictive subgroup for treatment_olaparib's positive effect on pfs_months is brca1_mutation=1 OR brca2_mutation=1; the effect is positive in both BRCA1 carriers (+0.398) and BRCA2 carriers (+0.295), and even larger in BRCA-positive premenopausal (+0.547) and BRCA-positive stage_iv=1 (+0.538) sub-strata.

The complete predictive subgroup for treatment_pembrolizumab's positive treatment-effect heterogeneity on pfs_months is triple_negative=1 + postmenopausal=0 (premenopausal TNBC), with postmenopausal=1 acting as a suppressor; unadjusted effect +0.275 months in this subgroup, attenuating to ~+0.02 after multivariable adjustment.

analyses.result_summary: Within er_positive=1 (any postmenopausal), palbociclib diff = +1.577 months (p<1e-300, n_treated=12194). Subdividing: ER+ postmenopausal +1.502 (p<1e-300, n_treated=7334 vs untreated 13747); ER+ premenopausal +1.690 (p=4.0e-293, n_treated=4860 vs untreated 8945). Effect is similar (slightly larger in premenopausal); postmenopausal is NOT a required suppressor of the palbociclib benefit.

Within brca_any=1 (n_treated=239, n_untreated=2260), olaparib diff = +0.346 months (p=0.041). BRCA1 alone: +0.398 (p=0.090); BRCA2 alone: +0.295 (p=0.225). Within brca_any=1 + postmenopausal=0: +0.547 (p=0.051); within brca_any=1 + stage_iv=1: +0.538 (p=0.066). Unified subgroup brca_any=1 is the best-supported predictive subset; BRCA1 vs BRCA2 are equivalent.

Three-way OLS (pfs_months ~ pembrolizumab * triple_negative * postmenopausal): pembrolizumab:triple_negative beta=+0.422 (p=5.8e-04); pembrolizumab:triple_negative:postmenopausal beta=-0.389 (p=1.3e-02). Within triple_negative=1 + postmenopausal=0: pembrolizumab diff = +0.275 (p=2.7e-3, n_treated=611). Within triple_negative=1 + postmenopausal=1: -0.059 (p=0.42, n_treated=967). After adjustment for age, ECOG, stage_iv, has_brain_mets, albumin, LDH, CRP, NLR within premenopausal TNBC, beta drops to +0.022 (p=0.14). Complete subgroup: triple_negative=1 + postmenopausal=0; postmenopausal status acts as a suppressor.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Final treatment-by-biomarker map for pfs_months: (i) treatment_palbociclib improves PFS by ~+1.58 months in er_positive=1, null (-0.02) in er_positive=0; (ii) treatment_olaparib improves PFS by ~+0.35 months in brca1_mutation=1 OR brca2_mutation=1 (significant unadjusted, attenuated after adjustment); (iii) treatment_pembrolizumab shows positive PFS within triple_negative=1 (especially premenopausal TNBC, +0.28 months unadjusted) and slight harm outside TNBC (-0.11 mo); (iv) treatment_trastuzumab, treatment_tamoxifen, and treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan show NO predictive subgroup with statistically significant PFS benefit in this cohort.

analyses.result_summary: treatment_trastuzumab in her2pos (n_treated=1890, n_untreated=7170): mean treated 4.254 vs untreated 4.334; diff -0.079 months (p=1.53e-01).
treatment_trastuzumab in her2neg (n_treated=8149, n_untreated=32791): mean treated 4.735 vs untreated 4.786; diff -0.051 months (p=1.06e-01).
treatment_tamoxifen in erpos (n_treated=10535, n_untreated=24351): mean treated 4.881 vs untreated 4.858; diff +0.023 months (p=4.49e-01).
treatment_tamoxifen in erneg (n_treated=4500, n_untreated=10614): mean treated 4.354 vs untreated 4.272; diff +0.081 months (p=3.00e-02).
treatment_palbociclib in er_postmen (n_treated=7334, n_untreated=13747): mean treated 5.827 vs untreated 4.325; diff +1.502 months (p=0.00e+00).
treatment_palbociclib in not_er_postmen (n_treated=10094, n_untreated=18825): mean treated 5.104 vs untreated 4.299; diff +0.805 months (p=3.39e-164).
treatment_olaparib in brca_any (n_treated=239, n_untreated=2260): mean treated 4.933 vs untreated 4.587; diff +0.346 months (p=4.05e-02).
treatment_olaparib in brca_none (n_treated=4707, n_untreated=42794): mean treated 4.646 vs untreated 4.702; diff -0.056 months (p=1.45e-01).
treatment_pembrolizumab in tnbc (n_treated=1578, n_untreated=8918): mean treated 4.366 vs untreated 4.294; diff +0.072 months (p=2.14e-01).
treatment_pembrolizumab in non_tnbc (n_treated=6007, n_untreated=33497): mean treated 4.699 vs untreated 4.813; diff -0.114 months (p=1.64e-03).
treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan in tnbc (n_treated=1084, n_untreated=9412): mean treated 4.228 vs untreated 4.314; diff -0.085 months (p=2.08e-01).
treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan in non_tnbc (n_treated=3903, n_untreated=35601): mean treated 4.813 vs untreated 4.794; diff +0.019 months (p=6.55e-01).
